parameters.jsCode:
const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body || {};
const rfpText = body.rfp_text || body.sections || '';
const title = body.title || body.opportunity || 'Unknown RFP';
const solNum = body.solicitation_number || '';

const prompt = [
  'COMPLIANCE MATRIX BUILDER for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA)',
  '',
  'RFP/PWS Title: ' + title,
  'Solicitation: ' + solNum,
  '',
  '=== RFP TEXT / SECTIONS ===',
  rfpText.substring(0, 12000) || '(No RFP text provided - generate a template compliance matrix for a typical DoD SETA contract)',
  '',
  'Parse the RFP/PWS and generate a compliance matrix. Return ONLY valid JSON:',
  '{',
  '  "title": "Compliance Matrix - [RFP Title]",',
  '  "solicitation_number": "[sol num]",',
  '  "total_requirements": 0,',
  '  "sections": [',
  '    {',
  '      "section_id": "L.1",',
  '      "section_title": "Section L - Instructions",',
  '      "requirements": [',
  '        {',
  '          "req_id": "L.1.1",',
  '          "requirement_text": "The offeror shall provide...",',
  '          "compliance_type": "L|M|X",',
  '          "volume": "Technical|Management|Past Performance|Price",',
  '          "page_limit": null,',
  '          "response_status": "NOT_STARTED|IN_PROGRESS|COMPLETE|N_A",',
  '          "assigned_to": "",',
  '          "notes": "",',
  '          "proposal_reference": "",',
  '          "evaluation_factor": ""',
  '        }',
  '      ]',
  '    }',
  '  ],',
  '  "evaluation_factors": [{"factor": "Technical Approach", "weight": "Most Important", "subfactors": []}],',
  '  "submission_requirements": {"due_date": "", "page_limits": {}, "format": "", "copies": ""},',
  '  "key_risks": ["risk description"],',
  '  "generated_at": "' + new Date().toISOString() + '"',
  '}',
  '',
  'L = Instructions to Offerors (Section L)',
  'M = Evaluation Criteria (Section M)', 
  'X = Cross-reference / PWS requirement',
  '',
  'Extract EVERY requirement. Do not skip any shall/must/will statements.',
  'Map each requirement to the appropriate proposal volume.',
  'If no RFP text provided, generate a realistic template for a DoD SETA contract with 20+ requirements across L, M, and PWS sections.'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { prompt, title, solNum } }];

options.systemMessage: You are a Shipley-certified proposal manager building compliance matrices for DoD contracts. Parse every requirement precisely. Return only valid JSON. No markdown fencing.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_compliance_matrices (title, solicitation_number, matrix_data) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb) RETURNING id
SELECT id, title, solicitation_number, created_at FROM gda_compliance_matrices ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', matrices: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), count: $input.all().length }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM gda_compliance_matrices WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.matrix_id || 0 }} LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: generate, list, get' }) }}
